form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when fifth and beaten 7 lengths at Richmond. Form solid prior to that including a win at Bulli three back. Looks a danger to the top few if returns to best form this time.

form.formComment: Fast starter. Last start finished sixth on March 31 over 388m at this track behind Matt Jet Power, beaten 10 lengths (23.12) in a Grade 5. Prepared to risk.

form.formComment: Resumes from a five months spell and was in the minors at only other fresh up run, finishing third over 515m at this track. Doesn't look smart enough to threaten the top few.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 0.8 lengths over 388m at this track in a handy (22.82), beating Pineapple Frida. Will find this a bit tougher, others read better.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 388m in 22.27. Followed that up with a minor placing over 388m at this track at Grade 5 a week ago. Thereabouts recently and definitely worth including.

form.formComment: Won over this track and trip. Last start finished 6th over 388m at this track beaten 8 lengths (23.01) behind Done Dealing in a Grade 4/5 on March 31. Has run blistering time here with a 22 PB at the distance. Hard to beat.
